creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
On Dec 9, 2006, at 6:21 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of databases/slony1,
>
> Please note that PR ports/106512 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106512

Firstly, how did slony1 port get to version 1.2.1 without my approval  
or notification?

I suppose you should go ahead and apply this patch to clean up the  
plist.  It looks like "miwi" did the commit against ports system  
policy of getting approval of the maintainer.
